sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/SoraAut.general_idea: Apply a custom configuration annotation to the main application class to enable specific cloud-related settings.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Replace deprecated jakarta.annotation.Resource with Spring constructor injection to align with Spring Boot 3.x standards.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Removed @Resource import and field injection; added private final AuthService field and constructor.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Add Swagger 3 (OpenAPI 3) annotations for API documentation support in Spring Boot 3.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Added imports for io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations and applied @Tag, @Operation, and @Parameter annotations.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Integrate custom user logging annotation to track authentication actions.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Added @UserLogAnno to login and logout endpoints with specific descriptions.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Rename login endpoint path variable from userId to name for semantic clarity.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Changed @GetMapping path from /login/{userId}/{password} to /login/{name}/{password} and updated parameter name.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Add logout endpoint to handle user session termination.
Add registration endpoint to allow new user creation.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Added @PostMapping /register method accepting User body and calling authService.register().

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Rename method from selectUserById to login to better reflect its authentication purpose.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Renamed public method selectUserById to login and updated service call to authService.login().

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger instance for potential future logging needs in the controller.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.human_impl: Added private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AuthController.class);

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Renamed the authentication method from selectUserById to login and updated parameter names to reflect semantic intent.
Added a new method signature for user registration functionality.
Added a new method signature for user logout functionality.
Added import for the User domain class required by the new register method signature.
Inject UserFeign client to enable remote user service calls for authentication logic.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.human_impl: private final UserFeign userFeign; public AuthServiceImpl(..., UserFeign userFeign) { ... }

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger instance to support structured logging for authentication events.
Rename login method and parameters to align with new service interface and semantic clarity.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.human_impl: public Result login(String name, String password) { ... }

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Replace hardcoded user data with a call to the remote UserFeign service to validate credentials.
Update JWT claims generation to use the new User entity field 'id' instead of 'userId'.
Update Redis token storage key to use the new User entity field 'id'.
Add informational log entry upon successful user login.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.human_impl: logger.info("{}：用户[{}]登陆成功", LogConstants.LOGIN_LOG, user.getName());

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Change login response to include the generated JWT token in the success result.
Implement registration method by delegating to the remote UserFeign service.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.human_impl: public Result register(User user) { return userFeign.register(user); }

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Implement logout functionality by extracting user ID from token and removing the token from Redis.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Update the Redis token prefix constant to include a namespace and colon separator for better key organization.
Add Swagger/OpenAPI 3 annotations to document the User entity for API documentation generation.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.human_impl: Added @Schema(description = "...") to the class and each field.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Enable Excel import/export functionality for the User entity using EasyPOI.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.human_impl: Added @Excel(name = "...") annotations to fields, including replace maps for enums.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Standardize date serialization and deserialization formats for birthday and createTime fields.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.human_impl: Added @JsonFormat and @DateTimeFormat with pattern "yyyy-MM-dd" to Date fields.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Disable serialization failure when encountering empty beans to prevent runtime exceptions.
Allow null values for primitive types during deserialization to avoid strict validation errors.
Ignore unknown properties during deserialization to improve API compatibility.

sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Replace @Autowired field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added a public constructor accepting RedisTemplate.

sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Add a utility method to retrieve all hash keys for a given Redis key.
sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.human_impl: Added hgetAllAkey method that calls redisTemplate.opsForHash().keys(key).

sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Add import for LinkedHashSet required by the new utility method.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.34 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compiler.
Upgrade Jackson to 2.15.2 for security patches and stability.
Upgrade PageHelper to 2.1.0 (likely a typo in version or specific fork, but represents an upgrade intent) and switch to the starter artifact.
Upgrade HikariCP to 5.1.0 for better performance and Java 21 compatibility.
Add Spring AMQP starter to enable RabbitMQ messaging capabilities.
Add Elasticsearch Rest High Level Client for search and indexing functionality.
Add Fastjson2 as an alternative JSON processing library.
Add OkHttp client for HTTP requests.
Add Jsoup for HTML parsing, likely for the spider module.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI (Swagger 3) for API documentation.
Add XXL-JOB core for distributed task scheduling.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics monitoring.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add EasyPoi for simplified Excel import/export operations.
Add RapidOCR for optical character recognition capabilities.
Add TwelveMonkeys ImageIO for extended image format support.
Add Sentinel datasource Nacos integration for flow control and circuit breaking.
Add Hive JDBC driver for interacting with Apache Hive.
Add user-feign module for service-to-service communication.
Add internal Sora framework modules (swagger, log) for unified project standards.

sora-auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Add sora-log dependency to enable logging functionality in the auth module.
Add user-feign dependency to enable Feign client calls to the user service.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin to support Spring Boot repackaging and execution.
Set the build final name to the project artifact ID for consistent artifact naming.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Sentinel Nacos datasource dependency for persistent rate limiting rules.
Add Spring AMQP starter for RabbitMQ integration.
Add explicit Jackson core and annotations dependencies.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for health and metrics endpoints.
Add Elasticsearch REST high-level client dependency.
Add MyBatis-Flex Spring Boot 3 starter to replace MyBatis-Plus.
Add HikariCP connection pool dependency explicitly.
Add EasyPoi base dependency for Excel processing.
Add OkHttp client dependency for HTTP requests.
Add XXL-Job core dependency for distributed task scheduling.
Add Spring Boot Test starter for unit testing.
Add internal Sora Swagger dependency for API documentation.
